name: Amaretti Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Tampa Bay Online
Preheat oven to 325 degrees. Mix meringue powder and water until stiff. Combine remaining ingredients; gently fold into whipped meringue. When thoroughly combined, form small balls of dough and flatten them into thick discs. Place on greased cookie sheet. Bake for 30-35 minutes, checking at 25 minutes to ensure they do not brown too much. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
